name: Greek Chicken and Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the first seven ingredients. Cook just until bubbly.
2. Cool mixture to room temperature.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the cooled mixture and chicken cut into strips; toss to coat.
4. Marinate for 20 to 30 minutes at room temperature.
5. Prepare Creamette Spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
6. In a Dutch oven or large skillet, heat remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat.
7. Add the chicken mixture and red peppers; stir-fry until the chicken is slightly pink.
8. Add yellow squash and zucchini; cook until hot.
9. In a small bowl, blend water, cornstarch, bouillon, and salt. Stir to combine.
10. Add the blended mixture to the chicken; stir constantly.
11. Cook until thickened and translucent.
12. Add hot spaghetti; toss to mix thoroughly.
13. Heat through completely.
14. Arrange on a warm serving platter and serve immediately.
15. Refrigerate leftovers.
